name: Steve Chabot
subject: The Return of the Queen
body:
The Return of the Queen No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-yk/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-y/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-j/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-t/)
### [The Return of the Queen](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-i/)
For 60 years, the Delta Queen cruised the rivers of America, giving its passengers a unique experience of what it was like to travel America's waterways back in the 1800's. Then 10 years ago, it all came to a halt, and this beautiful queen was chained to a dock in Chattanooga, Tennessee. How did this happen? [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-d/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Confrontation at the Border](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-u/)
Thousands of mostly young males from Honduras, Guatemala, and El Salvador, have joined together in caravans and are trying to get into our country through our southern border. Yes, there are some women and children too, and they are inevitably the ones CNN and others interview, and put in their news coverage of unfolding events. But most of the people coming are young, and male, and without accompanying children. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-b/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [Judiciary Committee](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-p/)
Well I'm back in Washington, after a month or so being home in Cincinnati, preparing for, and recovering from, the recent election. Again, thank you for having the confidence in me to represent your best interests in the swamp that is Washington nowadays. I'm girding up for battle in what will most certainly be a very different environment - at least in the House. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-x/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-m/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-c/)
### [So What Are We Likely to See in The New Congress?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-q/)
Well I'm back in Washington, after a month or so being home in Cincinnati, preparing for, and recovering from, the recent election. Again, thank you for having the confidence in me to represent your best interests in the swamp that is Washington nowadays. I'm girding up for battle in what will most certainly be a very different environment - at least in the House. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-a/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-f/)
### [T](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-z/)[hank You So Very Much!](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-v/)
First, thank you so very much for your support in this race. I'm so grateful for the opportunity to continue to represent you in Washington.

It was a late night last night watching all the election results coming in from around the state and across the nation. So I'll keep this week's blog short. Click the link below to read my thoughts on the night's results. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-e/) [Donate](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-s/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-g/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-w/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-yd/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-yh/)
---|---|---
2300 Montana Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.
[ Like ](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-yu/)
[ Tweet ](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-jl/)
[ Forward ](http://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jtguyyk-l-jr)
[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jtguyyk-961825B2-kujkulhluu-jy) | [Unsubscribe](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jtguyyk-kujkulhluu-ju/)

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: children are paying the price (add your voice)
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | You've heard it a lot for a long time. Republicans attack the Affordable Care Act. Now it's the Trump Administration undermining the Affordable Care Act. Attacks on the ACA happen so often, it would be easy to become desensitized to it. But the constant attacks cause real-life problems -- and not for the politicians causing them. **Over the past year, the number of uninsured children in Florida has increased by 37,000.** According to the _Tampa Bay Times_ , "confusion over the future of the Affordable Care Act, plus a decrease in funding for the law," along with the state's refusal to expand Medicare, are main contributing factors. When Republicans attack the ACA, families lose access to coverage. They lose access to life-saving procedures and prescription drugs. An attack on the ACA is an attack on the health and financial stability of our families. And despite the families suffering across the country, despite those 37,000 children in Florida going uninsured, the Trump Administration continues the attacks. **They issued new federal guidelines to undermine the law just this past week.** Here's the bottom line: These attacks need to end. Access to affordable and quality health care needs to extend to every family. That's what we should focus on now. [**If we want Trump to hear our message, we need a groundswell of support. Add your name to demand Trump and his Party stop the attacks and start working to expand healthcare access.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cc5/622b7b5b/1e269415/307b7e61/1370589118/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e181205") I will not stop fighting until every family in Florida has access to affordable health care. And I appreciate all of you who take the time to join me today. Debbie
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cc5/622b7b5b/1e269415/307b7e60/1370589118/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe")

name: Jason Yates
subject: Guess how many Americans live under trifecta governments?
body:
|
---
| Peter, In just a few weeks, state legislatures will swear in their newly elected representatives and governors while a few states have already done so. One interesting observation after an election is to note how many people will live in states with a trifecta government, where one party controls both state legislative chambers and the governorship. **Use one of the buttons below and guess how many Americans will live under trifecta state governments in 2019?** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRmLLymUKqiZFVFbCVlmLFgIpQpuctuUuDhW2ZOjLDk5YuQMPBa4Pa7A4XTenVPuuhoo3eJJoikwZL268wKHtr4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181206qna01&n=1) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRmLLymUKqiZFVFbCVlmLFgIpQpuctuUuDhW2ZOjLDk5YuQMPBa4Pa7A4XTenVPuuig7EHnWgj7qE-mse1qVULo&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181206qna01&n=2) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRmLLymUKqiZFVFbCVlmLFgIpQpuctuUuDhW2ZOjLDk5YuQMPBa4Pa7A4XTenVPuuvRU_Sltc4UT2yVGJLQoKpY&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181206qna01&n=3) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRmLLymUKqiZFVFbCVlmLFgIpQpuctuUuDhW2ZOjLDk5YuQMPBa4Pa7A4XTenVPuuriT2Lz2ZQSgbCBV93L_Y58&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181206qna01&n=4) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181206qna01&n=5)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: ‘A Great and Noble Man’: Bush Honored One Last Time in Washington
body:
"A military band played ‘Hail to the Chief,’ cannons sang out a 21-gun salute and the presidential jet took to the sky..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=530e048f51&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **‘A Great and Noble Man’: Bush Honored One Last Time in Washington**

“A military band played ‘Hail to the Chief,’ cannons sang out a 21-gun salute and the presidential jet took to the sky, lifting former President George H.W. Bush away from Washington one last time,” Stephan Dinan writes in the _Washington Examiner_.

“He stood in the breach in the Cold War against totalitarianism. He stood in the breach in Washington against unthinking partisanship. He stood in the breach against tyranny and discrimination. And on his watch, a wall fell in Berlin, a dictator’s aggression did not stand and doors across America opened to those with disabilities,” biographer Jon Meacham eulogized at the National Cathedral in Washington.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e1ca7b247d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The U.S. Navy will honor the late President George H.W. Bush with a record-breaking 21-aircraft memorial flyover formation on Thursday when the president is laid to rest in College Station, Texas,” Maria Biery reports for the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8c4dfc25a6&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Naval aviators will fly in a ‘missing man’ formation, which typically only involves four planes. The tribute to Bush will mark the largest missing man formation ever performed, according to Navy officials.”
---
|
---
| In _[The Daily Signal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=496fb8ea41&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Riley Walters writes that new trade negotiations between the United States and China are off to a successful start, with the recent meeting between President Donald J. Trump and President Xi Jinping of China being pivotal. “The two sides agreed to a process that will begin to address many of the outstanding tariffs, non-tariff barriers, and importantly, intellectual property complaints the U.S. has against China.”
---
|
---
| “President Trump's economic adviser Larry Kudlow says subsidies for electric cars and other renewable energy programs might soon be eliminated. That would be a major victory on the road to energy freedom,” the _[Investor’s Business Daily](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=db25e1931b&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. “The government shouldn't be picking winners and losers in the marketplace. That's especially true of energy, the lifeblood of the world economy.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e62c1fb998&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=324d6bf8ad&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=53746fd3a6)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: New Year's Resolution? Run for Office.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | Now more than ever, we need the next generation of Hoosier Democrats to step up and run. Peter, you can be apart of the change Democratic officials have been fighting for in Indiana. In 2019, cities and towns across our state will hold local elections. It’s the perfect opportunity for **_you_** to run. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3546866/25684980/334509856?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTNjMDlkYi1hZWY5LWU4MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4Nzg0ZjliNjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_HRgNIUHPvTpJL3C8nfEGurI-n8ILoruOSlkGSFXmWk=) Ready to run but don’t know where to begin? Join us on [January 12 in Indianapolis for a candidate training](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3546867/25684981/1139690363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTNjMDlkYi1hZWY5LWU4MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4Nzg0ZjliNjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_HRgNIUHPvTpJL3C8nfEGurI-n8ILoruOSlkGSFXmWk=) where experts from across the country will provide the tools to run and win. name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Announcing Governor Holcomb’s 2019 Next Level Agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Empty template Moments ago, Governor Eric Holcomb announced his 2019 Next Level
Agenda – and you’re one of the first to see this detailed plan!

<>

Friend,

Moments ago, Governor Eric Holcomb announced his 2019 Next Level Agenda – and
you’re one of the first to see this detailed plan!

Governor Holcomb’s 2019 Next Level Agenda continues work on his five pillars
essential to Hoosier success: the economy, infrastructure, education and
workforce development, public health and the drug epidemic, and delivering
great government service for Hoosiers.

This is the detailed strategic plan that will ensure Hoosier success in 2019
and beyond:

Cultivate a Strong & Diverse Economy

Indiana is the fiscal envy of the nation – and we intend to keep our economy
growing! That starts with passing Indiana's eighth-straight balanced budget
with responsible reserves and modernizing economic development tools to
increase competitiveness, economic diversity and flexibility.

Maintain & Build the State's Infrastructure

Ask Governor Holcomb, and he’ll tell you that in the Crossroads of America,
infrastructure is the key to connecting Hoosiers to each other and the world.
Through our Next Level Connections initiative, announced in September, we will
grow our infrastructure, including accelerating the completion of I-69 to 2024
and expanding access to high-speed, affordable broadband to unserved
communities.

Stand With Hoosiers Through Every Step of the Their Education

That includes early learning, high school, and workforce training as Hoosiers
look to skill-up to fill today's new high-wage, high-demand jobs. Specifically,
we’ll give schools flexibility to develop partnerships to expose students to
more opportunities, and we’ll expand the Workforce Ready Grants and Employer
Training Grants that are making Next Level Jobs such a big success.

Promote Public Health & Attack the Drug Epidemic

Working to help lift up Hoosier children and families is essential to
promoting public health. We will adopt school safety recommendations, including
more mental health tools and physical safety enhancements. This plan will help
children in need through the Department of Child Services, as well as provide
new tools to lower infant mortality and help those recovering from the drug
epidemic.

Deliver Great Government Service

It’s time to modernize our state government technology, as well as streamline
state boards and commissions to make it easier for Hoosiers to interact with
their government.

With these five pillars as guidance, 2019 will be a year of progress and
concrete results for Hoosiers across the state, and Governor Holcomb is
extremely excited to put this plan into action!

Keep an eye out for additional updates on Governor Holcomb’s 2019 Next Level
Agenda!

Thank you,

Holcomb Crew

Contributions by corporations and labor organizations are limited to $5,000
annually; contributions by individuals, LLCs & political committees are not
limited.
Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited.

Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2018. All rights reserved.

Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 1180, Indianapolis, IN
46204 | (317) 569-0709

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

Unsubscribe
<http://links.holcombforindiana.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_s=2e865899d4ed4319a73edf67027c879c&_t=jtf8WapKnDAKg83N3YFed0EZR_lq7R1HkvBu3af-wiyC2Joujfb0FcjZ1K9LQYM-X7fls21Fu4NNxCqnE_ebrc4YKy8cW5HDgKhUbwCk432NePH9TyZ84ZuPRT9RMVjvfzv4T8sTL3n0BifGBwsiiX4-KpOaTayd_m5gzKgbgJ4%3D>
